presentation.claim_boundary: Screenshots of real product surfaces in their honest disconnected/standalone states. Not a working end-to-end workflow demonstration.

source.capture_method: Unmodified `vite build` output of the desktop cockpit served locally and screenshotted with Playwright at device_scale_factor 2 in a 1120x760 viewport (the app's real default window size). No Tauri runtime or engine sidecar was attached, so the cockpit rendered its real connect (Sign in) surface via its own graceful-degradation code path. No DOM was injected or modified.

The published openadapt-tray package running live in the macOS menu bar with its real menu open, captured with the macOS `screencapture` utility and cropped. A neutral dark window was placed behind the menu before capture; the menu bar, icon, and menu are unmodified. The pynput global-hotkey listener was not started (it requires macOS Input Monitoring permission unavailable to the capture session); all other components ran as shipped. State shown is the real standalone state: no desktop companion process was running and sync is offline.
